case_title: ANA RAMIREZ VS. SANMO INTERNATIONAL COMPANY, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, ANA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-06-2014 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---AVELINA PRITCHARD. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. SPANISH INTERPRETER ORDERED FOR PLAINTIFF FOR THE NEXT HEARING DATE. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN C. LAMBERT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED SEP-15-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANMO INTERNATIONAL COMPANY, INC.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RAMIREZ, ANA AS TO DEFENDANT SANMO INTERNATIONAL COMPANY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2014 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF "ENVELOPE STAMPED "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS" COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANMO INTERNATIONAL COMPANY, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SANMO INTERNATIONAL COMPANY, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN GARY--EMPLOYEE; GLENN NIEVA--BUS DRIVER; EDWARD MARTELL. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARTA RESEN. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, ANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SANMO INTERNATIONAL COMPANY, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
